name: Oreo Cookie Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch tube pan.
3. Cut each sandwich cookie into quarters.
4. In a large bowl, with mixer on low speed, beat together flour and remaining ingredients (except cookies and glaze) until blended.
5. Increase mixer speed to High; beat for 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
6. Spoon about 3/4 cup batter into the prepared pan.
7. Gently stir in the cut-up cookies and remaining batter, then spoon into the same pan.
8. Bake for 50 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched (the toothpick test will not work).
9. Cool the cake in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and cool completely on a rack.
10. When the cake is cool, prepare the chocolate glaze by melting all ingredients together over low heat in a quart saucepan, stirring constantly until smooth. Drizzle over the cooled cake.
